hero.title: We are Isella Group
hero.subtitle: Developing innovative business projects in international markets

about.title: Who We Are
about.description: Isella Group is an international agency that develops innovative business projects in international markets. Our team of specialists covers areas from marketing and sales to project management and construction work.
about.highlight: Innovation, creativity, and teamwork drive everything we do.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We adapt to new market trends and develop cutting-edge solutions.

teamwork.title: Teamwork
teamwork.description: Our multicultural team brings diverse perspectives to every project.

experience.title: Experience
experience.description: Years of expertise across multiple industries and international markets.

creativity.title: Creativity
creativity.description: We think outside the box to deliver unique solutions for our clients.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.description: Get in touch with us and let's build something great together.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Our Story
about.story: Isella Group was established in 2020 by Dennis Czekalla. We focus on developing innovative business ventures, starting with our flagship project Berghaus – Tiny House. Since then, we have rapidly expanded, building dedicated production and sales operations while gaining the trust of individual customers and business partners alike.

team.title: Our Team
team.description: Our workforce comprises ambitious, creative professionals characterized by significant cultural and linguistic diversity. Team members bring varied expertise across multiple disciplines, including marketing, sales, project management, administrative roles, architecture, and construction.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We are an agency committed to helping clients expand their business internationally through our established network and multinational environment.

berghaus.title: Berghaus – Tiny House
berghaus.description: Our flagship project: mobile wooden dwellings built from high-quality natural materials with emphasis on sustainability. Customizable to individual specifications and manufactured in-house since 2022.

career.title: Career
career.subtitle: Join Isella Group!
career.description: We are a young, rapidly growing company made up of creative and ambitious people. We are looking for candidates for both office and construction positions.
career.cta: We are open to new people who, with their interesting ideas and commitment, will contribute to the success of our projects.

positions.title: Open Positions
positions.description: Send us your application and tell us about yourself.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Happy to answer all your questions
contact.description: Don't miss the opportunity, contact Isella Group. We will listen to your needs and formulate the appropriate offer.

form.name: Your Name
form.success: Thank you! Your message has been sent.
